source: MÖRK BORG Bare Bones Edition + MBC supplements. GM roll tables not already surfaced by a dedicated generator.

adventure_seed_where.name: Adventure Seed — Where
entries: On the barren fields of Kergüs
In the centre of Alliáns
On a beach not distant from Grift
On a dirty Schleswig street
In the poor Wästland countryside
At the city wall of Galgenbeck
In the untamed wilds of Tveland
Near the Valley of the Unfortunate Undead
Pretty much lost in Sarkash
At the Bergen Chrypt tree line
Onboard a ship on the Endless Sea
In a forgotten part of Graven-Tosk

adventure_seed_who.name: Adventure Seed — Who Contacts You
entries: One-eyed woman who rules the thieves
Bureaucrat with enemies and no honor
Badly burned priest
Noble child said to see dark visions
Warrior that switched loyalties
Faint whispers from the crypt
Remorseful hangman
Tortured traitor
Recurring vision in a horrid nightmare
Hermit mocked by the other cave-folk
Demented elder
Sacrifice who escaped a death-cult
Monk who was bitten at night
Unshaved mystic at The Paunchy Swine
Devastated mother dressed in white
Sailor too long at sea
Scoundrel covered in ulcers
Drunk seeress with no teeth
Restless soul by the name of Ghast
Terrified soldier with broken knees

adventure_seed_why.name: Adventure Seed — Why (The Spark)
entries: The undead-riddled Valley awaits
Thirteen priests are missing
Wrongly imprisoned for murder
66 sacrifices are needed
Children missing at Lake Onda
Sinkhole swallows half of Schleswig
Sabotage an unholy alliance
The count goes insane at night
Hunted by bloodthirsty death-cult
Trapped by an earthquake
Verhu's prophecy is false!
Rumours of a cursed treasure
Kidnapped blood-wizard
A dead demon is resurrected
Every grave is emptied one night
Enormous cave system near Grift
The dead refuse to stay dead
PCs are selected for ritual sacrifice
Anthelia falls severely ill
PC dopplegangers go berserk
Take part in a holy mass burial
The entire kingdom has nightmares
Something has infiltrated the court
Artefact must be destroyed
Map the land in the west
Talk of an unexplored island
Gain the trust of a dangerous hermit
Find the way to Cube-Violet
Stop a Grift suicide-cult
Pardon a mad mass-murderer
Defend a fort from the undead
Steal a sarcophagus from a caravan
A fire threatens to devour Sarkash
Go to the land of the dead and back
HE demands a gift. See it delivered
Powerful elixir needs ingredients
Slave revolt in Galgenbeck
Mystical ruins are unearthed
They're coming out of the walls!
Three assassinations each night
Alchemist needs a living goblin
A strange ship ran aground
A weirdness leaves Bergen Chrypt
Seven women with black eyes
The icon's eyes have been stolen
The beast beneath the bridge
Movement in a black star's crater
Light from broken sewer gate
Children hum forbidden songs
Newly discovered path in Sarkash

contents_of_pockets.name: Contents of Pockets
entries: The remains of something worthless crumbles in your hands.
Pot filled with extremely potent itching ointment.
Necklace of human teeth.
Bag of angry, venomous moths. Test Toughness dr6 or die.
Pocket full of broken glass, pc takes d2 damage.
Mad manifesto. If read, test Presence dr12 or lose 1 Presence permanently from confusion.
Key to nearby locked door. Stolen.
Map to a weak but wealthy family's house.
A hopeless amount of spiders.
Metal cylinder with gunpowder and fuse. d6: 1-2 lose a hand; 3-6 deals 3d10 where it lands.
Known and liked/despised witch-hunter's face. Flayed.
Note with the PCs' names. One is crossed out.
Tortured pixie with torn-off wings and gouged-out eyes.
Map to a place that cannot possibly exist.
Unmarked bottle, liquid shifts between red and green.
Bond. A local potentate owes the holder a sizable amount.
Death mask of one of the PCs.
The 'Water of Life.' Heals d8. Toughness dr10 or go blind. Highly alcoholic.
Hands covered with something lukewarm, brown, and acidic. d2+1 damage; stink for d4 days.
Black Kergüs dagger. 2d4 damage.
Labelled poison bottle. Toughness dr12 or lower a random ability by d4.
Scalp with long black hair.
Golden ball with an invisible seam, twists open.
Bloodstained knuckle-duster.
Two weighted dice.
The result in silver.

troubling_tales.name: Troubling Tales
entries: Pursued for manslaughter. There is a bounty.
In massive debt, traded to ever more ruthless groups.
Carries a rare, sought-after item.
A cursed wound that never heals.
Had an illegal, immoral and secret affair with a member of the royal family. Has proof.
Escaped cult member. Terrified, paranoid. Cultists are everywhere.
An identity thief — recently killed and replaced who they appear to be.
Banished and disowned for unspecified deeds. Can never go home.
Deserted the military after a massacre. Hunted by former friends. Bounty on head.
Very recently murdered a close relative. Very recently.
A puzzle cube calibrated incorrectly (or has it?) is waking a slumbering abomination.
Evil creatures love your scent and are drawn to it, bringing disaster in your wake.
A metal shard inches toward your heart. 2% per day it arrives.
Violence forced you into the wilderness. You think the trees whisper. You scream at and attack them.
Cursed to share the nightmares of others. You sleep far away.
At permanent war with all corvids. No contact without some violence. You carry a sling.
After a dream of an underground temple to a forgotten god, you understand the songs of insects and worms.
Tracked by a golem after an agreement wiped from your mind.
'Burn or be burned' is the fate you accept.
You heal twice as fast, companions twice as slow. You see a many-eyed 'guardian angel.'

unheroic_feats.name: Unheroic Feats
entries: Assassin's Deathblow — grapple an unaware foe (Str dr12); auto-crit with a one-handed blade.
Battle-hardened Deathspeaker — cast Powers in medium armor (twice: heavy).
Beastly Scholar — scry by gutting beasts; an omen per 10 HP, once per kind.
Bloodied Knuckles — unarmed d6 ignoring light armor (stackable). Fumble breaks your hand.
Blood Pact — telepathic link with a partner; share all sensation, injury, and death.
Bloodthirsty Rage — on a kill, move and attack again, +d6 per kill; collapse on first miss.
Bone Crafter — craft weapons (1 corpse), shields (5), light armor (10).
Butcher — Agl dr12 surgery makes a dying ally merely broken; if they die, d4 rations.
Calm Killer — once per turn, reroll damage and keep the higher.
Cat's Eyes — perfect dark vision (sun burns). Feel a beast's feelings by staring.
Dual Wielder — no two-weapon penalty; roll both damage dice and combine.
Fateful Visions — spend an omen to ask the GM one question (d4: on 1, deceptive).
Iron Stomach — eat rot/putrid flesh with Tou dr6.
First Strike — always act first if your action inflicts harm.
Gutsy Strike — zweihänder at +2 dr for +d6 damage; a miss lets the foe strike at +2 dr.
Harbinger of Misery — 4 max omens; GM rolls two misery dice per day while you live.
Herbalist Healer — once/day brew an infection-curing elixir (d4 HP); fail = toxin.
Horrific Growth — grow a fully functional extra arm. Read as a sign of evil.
Hyper Awareness — never surprised; initiative on 3+.
Immortal Memory — relive tragedies in places of suffering; 1/20 they become real.
Inspired Storyteller — Pre dr9 (+1/listener) at rest to give everyone an omen.
Leech — a pint of blood heals d4 HP; starve on a normal diet alone.
Likeable — reaction rolls: 3d6 keep the highest two.
Living Armor — no Agility penalty from armor (not defence); can't remove it without dying.
Lucky — no omens; always 2d20 keep highest. Fumble on either 1.
Mortal Draw — first hit in combat auto-max damage; a miss lets the foe strike at +2 dr.
Negotiator — Pre dr6+highest enemy morale to halt fighting.
Outback Survivalist — Pre dr9 (+1/person) at rest to camp; all recover 2d6 HP.
Party Chef — Pre dr9 (+1/portion) at rest to stretch one ration to feed everyone.
Piper — speak with rats; whistle to attract d4.
Power Word — know one random Power; carve a scroll's glyphs into your flesh.
Predatory Sense — smell humans a room away; track via Pre dr12.
Reckless Attacker — attack a target twice; a second miss lets the foe strike at +2 dr.
Shield Breaker — blocking all damage with a shield lets you counter at +3 damage.
Skinner — wear a fresh kill's skin to disguise yourself; decays in d4 hours.
Vile Blood — biters poisoned (d4 for d6 rounds). On infection, d2: on 2, none.

tablets_of_ochre_obscurity.name: Tablets of Ochre Obscurity
tablets_of_ochre_obscurity.note: Used like scrolls (same rules: Presence DR12, daily uses, fumble/crit apply). Require Presence +3 minimum OR be a Forlorn Philosopher. Each tablet is a normal-sized item. On an attack or defence fumble, one tablet breaks. A fumbled attack or defence roll while holding tablets: one breaks.
entries: Dream Theory — target doubts reality; they suffer −2 DR on all attack and defence rolls against you.
Total Matter Comprehension — mend or break any normal-sized item (including armor tiers and weapons).
Ping the Shared Subconscious — sense all living creatures within 70 feet, even through walls.
Logical Prognostication — deduce traps and mechanisms within 30 feet, or identify Powers used within 60 feet.
Carno-Organic Speleophagy — transform a child-sized rock into burnt, chewy meat that feeds d4 people.
Time-Locked Pneumotoxin — release a powder; target takes d6 damage (on a 6: instant death). Tablet reappears each morning.
Induced Irrelevance — remove a creature's meaning from reality for d4 rounds; enemies will not attack it (even if it attacks them).
Structural Cryo-condensation (Freezing Moon) — freeze water from the air into a 15-foot bridge, OR freeze all water within 150 feet solid.
Meta-Alchemy — transform a liquid into: 2 doses of Red or Black Poison, OR Loathing of Vulark (DR16 Tou or compelled to leap from heights), OR transform any poison into water or wine.
Memetic Cognitive Palpitation — body language transmits a mind-plague; target dances madly for d4 rounds and cannot attack or defend.

unclean_scrolls.name: Unclean Scrolls
entries: Palms Open the Southern Gate — a ball of fire strikes d2 creatures; d8 damage each.
Tongue of Eris — one creature of your choice is confused for 10 minutes.
Te-le-kin-esis — move an object up to d10×10 feet for d6 minutes.
Lucy-Fire's Levitation — hover for Presence + d10 rounds.
Daemon of Capillaries — one creature suffocates for d6 rounds, losing d4 hp per round.
Nine Violet Signs Unknot the Storm — d2 lightning bolts, d6 damage each.
Metzhuotl Blind Your Eye — one creature invisible d6 rounds (attack/defend DR6) until damaged.
Foul Psychompomp — summon (d6): 1–3 d4 skeletons / 4–6 d4 zombies.
Eyelid Blinds the Mind — d4 creatures sleep one hour unless they pass DR14.
Death — all creatures within 30 feet lose a total of 4d10 hp.

sacred_scrolls.name: Sacred Scrolls
entries: Grace of a Dead Saint — d2 creatures regain d10 hp each.
Grace for a Sinner — one creature gains +d6 on a single roll.
Whispers Pass the Gate — ask three questions of a deceased creature.
Aegis of Sorrow — one creature gains 2d6 extra hp for 10 rounds.
Unmet Fate — one creature dead no longer than a week wakes with terrible memories.
Bestial Speech — speak with animals for d20 minutes.
False Dawn / Night's Chariot — light or pitch black for 3d10 minutes.
Hermetic Step — You find all traps in your path for 2d10 minutes.
Roskoe's Consuming Glare — d4 creatures lose d8 hp each.
Enochian Syntax — one creature blindly obeys a single command.

arcane_catastrophes.name: Arcane Catastrophes
arcane_catastrophes.source: Bare Bones, p.43-45. Roll the same result twice and the caster explodes in screaming black fire — d6 damage each round, fed only by water.
entries: One by one your teeth fall out. Long, brittle fingernails replace them in your gums. Your smile is horrific and you find it hard to eat.

You feel fine. It's fine. You pustulate with a magical STD. Those intimate with you will die of plague within d4 days, then rise as woeful weeping zombies who track you down in your dreams before finding you in reality.

Your skeleton is possessed and will do anything to kill you and escape (drowning or piercing preferred, to spare the bones). Test Strength DR10 in stressful situations or take d4 damage. When you die, you become a zombie.
The illusion of the celestial sphere is lifted; you see what dwells beyond. And it sees you. Gazing upon a clear night sky drives you mad with fear.
An unending snow of black ash falls around you, perceived only by you and the mad. Water sickens you from this day on — only ash, soot, or burnt remains quench your thirst.

The earth decays around you like wet flesh. You sink 3 feet, unable to climb out without help. d4 translucent, crayfish-like children with your face cling, scream, and bite. (HP 3, Morale —, no armor, bite/pinch d4)
Your skin tatters like paper, your flesh melts like wax, and your intestines bloat like balloons, bursting and falling out — until all that is left is a walking, talking skeleton.
A gnashing gap-toothed mouth splits open on your neck. It spits out your secrets and inner thoughts, and can be silenced to sleep only with blood.
The sky warps and stars spin like wheels. Thrown one day into the future, you arrive vomiting Time as evaporating silver bile. A Misery is fulfilled.
Light itself despises you. If you gaze upon a candle, lamp, or torch, it goes out.

Within d4 days a vile cocoon heaves from the ground and bursts, spawning your exact clone — unintelligent, spreading mischief and suffering. It recurs every few days until the ground is cleansed with holy water or fire.
Your eyes burn with insufferable agony, bleeding heavily before loosening and falling from their gory pits. You continue to see through them wherever they are.
You and a random nearby creature pass out. When you wake, your souls have switched. Welcome to your new flesh.
Five twisted, skeletal arms burst from your back. The hands are mischievous, violent, and terribly cruel.
Your skin pales and emits a sickly greenish light. Living things held close fall ill — weakening, bones brittle, teeth and hair falling out.
The Power works, but fate or a demonic force perverts its effects to your precise disadvantage.
The scroll crumbles to tendrils of fine black powder that reaches for your nose and mouth. Make a Toughness DR14 test or lose d10 HP.
The Power pierces you like a knife, feeding on your anima. You are permanently gaunt, drawn, and insatiably hungry. When resting you restore only half the rolled HP.

You fall through Refva into Cube-Violet, an esoteric dimension. Walls smooth, iridescent, cold; above, an endless inferno. To leave (d4): 1) slay riddling Kulvan, who holds three colorless pearls; 2) poison a close friend with crumbled Sict-Shroom; 3) reach through the fire to the golden key (d4 fingers burn to ash); 4) wait in maddening timeless silence until another fool arrives.
Perhaps it's for the best. HE emerges from the shadows. At least your suffering is short, almost instantaneous, as the two-headed basilisk devours you.

basilisks_demand.name: The Basilisks Demand (Tribute)
entries: A sword that has killed exactly one dozen times
A widower's wedding ring
Silver from a sinner's grave
Eyes that have seen the Shimmering Fields
The year's first-born goat
Blutday bread
The cuticle of an executed innocent
A troll's heart valves
A dagger onto which the condemned carved their victims' name
Rare anti-obsidian from the Urilian crypts
The forbidden brew of the hermit of Terion
An orgh-maggot from the ice of Kergüs
A body mutilated by those who loved it in life
Joy's lampoon written in blood
The gall of a Chrypt-vulture
Moss upon which a dying man has slept
A child born with the third eye
A body drowned in Lake Onda
The rear molar of the Gluttonous
Gems from overflowing pockets
